issue.title: www.googleadservices.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.googleadservices.com/pagead/aclk?sa=L&ai=DChsSEwjB_LLGx6-TAxUkVQ8CHR8INtsYACICCAEQCRoCdGI&co=1&ase=3&agsac=LHhUJW73ZfU&gclid=Cj0KCQjw4PPNBhD8ARIsAMo-icykVxZ7Qm-PhfmHFerCijQnWE-eSfZDOureGgx](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.googleadservices.com%2Fpagead%2Faclk%3Fsa%3DL%26ai%3DDChsSEwjB_LLGx6-TAxUkVQ8CHR8INtsYACICCAEQCRoCdGI%26co%3D1%26ase%3D3%26agsac%3DLHhUJW73ZfU%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw4PPNBhD8ARIsAMo-icykVxZ7Qm-PhfmHFerCijQnWE-eSfZDOureGgx) ### Comment > 在已啟用「Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion」過濾器且將「www.googleadservices.com」加入允許網站清單的情況下仍無法訪問Pixel首頁左側的廣告。 ``` Username: @Chwunkai ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3owuubucn5usc4kcg44sgwg8sk4s8o8e51cnf5ovxc.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ijze03mp0nk8kss4o04ggk8gswg48887bdnh7rjztw.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 3 ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d3szm680dcocks444ggcoog088swgcg53tnmy3ru28.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/88hhmfc9vls0kk0wggc84gs08wg4k0ga6qr3qdliiw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.12.3 System version: | `Android 16` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
AdGuard Base filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
AdGuard Annoyances filter

**Other:**

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Chinese filter Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `h3://dns.nextdns.io/66b55d/Pixel`, `quic://Pixel-66b55d.dns.nextdns.io` Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/import?product=and&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.googleadservices.com%2Fpagead%2Faclk%3Fsa%3DL%26ai%3DDChsSEwjB_LLGx6-TAxUkVQ8CHR8INtsYACICCAEQCRoCdGI%26co%3D1%26ase%3D3%26agsac%3DLHhUJW73ZfU%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw4PPNBhD8ARIsAMo-icykVxZ7Qm-PhfmHFerCijQnWE-eSfZDOureGgx&version=4.12.3&filters=AdGuard+Mobile+Ads+filter%2CAdGuard+Base+filter%2CAdGuard+Cookie+Notices+filter%2CAdGuard+Other+Annoyances+filter%2CAdGuard+Mobile+App+Banners+filter%2CAdGuard+Popups+filter%2CAdGuard+Widgets+filter%2CAdGuard+Annoyances+filter%2CFilter+unblocking+search+ads+and+self-promotion%2CAdGuard+Chinese+filter&dns_servers=h3%3A%2F%2Fdns.nextdns.io%2F66b55d%2FPixel%2Cquic%3A%2F%2FPixel-66b55d.dns.nextdns.io)

comment.body: Hi, I forgot to remove the DNS server address before submitting the report. Since it contains a specific config ID, I would be very appreciate if you could help me remove it. Thank you!

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XNjUxNzA0NjQzNg==.html?s=beeacc87d8e8444d8615](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XNjUxNzA0NjQzNg%3D%3D.html%3Fs%3Dbeeacc87d8e8444d8615) ### Comment > https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8hmi42vfly808oow088cog84oc84kwsdsswkoxwchc.png > > P.S. Playing videos on this website caused AdGuard for Windows 7.22.5 to crash multiple times (disable and then enable). You can watch this episode without logging in as a member. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
